title: Headless lamp and simple build job execution slice
summary: Implement the authoritative Simulation Worker/headless command-to-job execution slice for prioritize lamp work and a minimal build/place job with structured results.
acceptance: Authoritative headless/Worker path accepts reviewed lamp-priority and simple-build commands and creates explicit job state instead of shell-local UI-only feedback
At least one deterministic scenario proves command -> job marker/read-model -> pawn claim -> move/step progression -> complete or structured blocked reason
Build/place slice supports a minimal blueprint/build-site job with progress and completion/failure projection, without claiming final construction balance
Command results and rejection reasons are structured and covered for invalid target, no resource, no path, no worker, stale command and policy/rule denial where applicable
Save/replay/determinism evidence is recorded or explicit non-persistence boundaries are reviewed before any UI integration relies on the state

history.details: Implemented authoritative Worker/headless lamp-priority and simple-build command-to-job slice with schema-v2 command/results, explicit runtime job/pawn/read-model state, structured blocked reasons, deterministic replay evidence, and all required checks passing.

changes_requested: High: rejected duplicate PrioritizeLampWork mutates authoritative lamp order/pawn marker before returning rejected; High: validateBasis ignores target/map/reservation/job version mismatches and accepts stale reviewed basis; Medium: schema-v2 batch rejection still emits legacy accepted/reason instead of ADR-0012 batchAccepted/batchReason.

Addressed reviewer changes: rejected lamp duplicates no longer mutate authoritative read model, stale owner-version bases reject as stale_command, schema-v2 batch rejections include batchAccepted/batchReason/commandResults; focused and required checks pass.

verified: No blocking findings; verified duplicate PrioritizeLampWork rejection leaves lamp/read-model state unchanged, validateBasis rejects snapshot/target/map/reservation/job version mismatches as stale_command, and schema-v2 batch rejection includes batchAccepted/batchReason/commandResults. Focused tests, headless run, taskctl validate, git diff --check, and typecheck pass.

Rebased on main 6f1a124; verified reviewer repair; integration gate passed: focused protocol/core/worker tests, focused WM-0150 sim run, M5 100000-tick scenario, m5-invariants, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, typecheck, and pnpm quality.

forbiddenPaths: weakening deterministic iteration, 30 TPS, structured reason or hot-path allocation rules

review.summary: No blocking findings; verified duplicate PrioritizeLampWork rejection leaves lamp/read-model state unchanged, validateBasis rejects snapshot/target/map/reservation/job version mismatches as stale_command, and schema-v2 batch rejection includes batchAccepted/batchReason/commandResults. Focused tests, headless run, taskctl validate, git diff --check, and typecheck pass.

integration.summary: Rebased on main 6f1a124; verified reviewer repair; integration gate passed: focused protocol/core/worker tests, focused WM-0150 sim run, M5 100000-tick scenario, m5-invariants, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, typecheck, and pnpm quality.
